visual_description: In a dimly lit, tiled room, a man in a shiny, patterned jacket shakes hands with an older man in a light-colored suit. The man in the suit then turns and speaks to another man in a dark shirt, who gestures with his hand before pulling out a small, dark object. Several other men stand in the background, observing the interaction.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in a foreign language, followed by a loud, sustained electronic tone.
